children.html: {(yi,xi)}i=1N\{(y_i, x_i)\}_{i=1}^N{(yi​,xi​)}i=1N​

children.value: これに対する次のようなモデルを単回帰モデルという。

children.html: yi=β0+β1xi+εiy_i = \beta_0 + \beta_1 x_i + \varepsilon_iyi​=β0​+β1​xi​+εi​

children.value: （ordinary least squares: OLS）という方法を使うのが最も一般的である。これは実測値

children.html: yiy_iyi​
y^i=β0+β1xi\hat{y}_i = \beta_0 + \beta_1 x_iy^​i​=β0​+β1​xi​
yi−y^iy_i - \hat{y}_iyi​−y^​i​

children.value: の二乗和（residual sum of squares）

children.html: RSS=∑i=1N(yi−y^i)2=∑i=1N(yi−β0−β1xi)2RSS = \sum_{i=1}^N (y_i - \hat{y}_i)^2 = \sum_{i=1}^N (y_i - \beta_0 - \beta_1 x_i)^2RSS=i=1∑N​(yi​−y^​i​)2=i=1∑N​(yi​−β0​−β1​xi​)2

children.value: を最小化するようにパラメータを推定するというもの。
この最適化は、まずRSSをパラメータ

children.html: β0,β1\beta_0, \beta_1β0​,β1​

children.value: について微分し、これがゼロとなるようなパラメータを求める。

children.html: {∂RSS∂β0=−2∑i=1N(yi−β0−β1xi)=0∂RSS∂β1=−2∑i=1N(yi−β0−β1xi)xi=0\left\{ \begin{align} \frac{\partial RSS}{\partial \beta_0} &= -2 \sum_{i=1}^N (y_i - \beta_0 - \beta_1 x_i) = 0 \\ \frac{\partial RSS}{\partial \beta_1} &= -2 \sum_{i=1}^N (y_i - \beta_0 - \beta_1 x_i) x_i = 0 \end{align}\right.⎩⎨⎧​∂β0​∂RSS​∂β1​∂RSS​​=−2i=1∑N​(yi​−β0​−β1​xi​)=0=−2i=1∑N​(yi​−β0​−β1​xi​)xi​=0​​

{Nβ0+∑i=1Nβ1xi=∑i=1Nyi∑i=1Nβ0xi+∑i=1Nβ1xi2=∑i=1Nyixi\left\{ \begin{align} N \beta_0 + \sum_{i=1}^N \beta_1 x_i &= \sum_{i=1}^N y_i \\ \sum_{i=1}^N \beta_0 x_i + \sum_{i=1}^N \beta_1 x_i^2 &= \sum_{i=1}^N y_i x_i \end{align} \right .⎩⎨⎧​Nβ0​+i=1∑N​β1​xi​i=1∑N​β0​xi​+i=1∑N​β1​xi2​​=i=1∑N​yi​=i=1∑N​yi​xi​​​
∂RSS∂β0=−2∑i=1N(yi−β0−β1xi)=0\frac{\partial RSS}{\partial \beta_0} = -2 \sum_{i=1}^N (y_i - \beta_0 - \beta_1 x_i) = 0∂β0​∂RSS​=−2i=1∑N​(yi​−β0​−β1​xi​)=0
2∑i=1Nβ0⏟Nβ0+2∑i=1Nβ1xi=2∑i=1Nyi2 \underbrace{ \sum_{i=1}^N \beta_0 }_{N \beta_0} + 2 \sum_{i=1}^N \beta_1 x_i = 2 \sum_{i=1}^N y_i2Nβ0​i=1∑N​β0​​​+2i=1∑N​β1​xi​=2i=1∑N​yi​
Nβ0+∑i=1Nβ1xi=∑i=1NyiN \beta_0 + \sum_{i=1}^N \beta_1 x_i = \sum_{i=1}^N y_iNβ0​+i=1∑N​β1​xi​=i=1∑N​yi​
∂RSS∂β1=−2∑i=1N(yi−β0−β1xi)xi=0\frac{\partial RSS}{\partial \beta_1} = -2 \sum_{i=1}^N (y_i - \beta_0 - \beta_1 x_i) x_i = 0∂β1​∂RSS​=−2i=1∑N​(yi​−β0​−β1​xi​)xi​=0
∑i=1Nβ0xi+∑i=1Nβ1xi2=∑i=1Nyixi\sum_{i=1}^N \beta_0 x_i + \sum_{i=1}^N \beta_1 x_i^2 = \sum_{i=1}^N y_i x_ii=1∑N​β0​xi​+i=1∑N​β1​xi2​=i=1∑N​yi​xi​
1N∑i=1Nxi\frac{1}{N} \sum_{i=1}^N x_iN1​∑i=1N​xi​

∑i=1Nβ0xi+1Nβ1(∑i=1Nxi)2=1N(∑i=1Nyi)(∑i=1Nxi)\sum_{i=1}^N \beta_0 x_i + \frac{1}{N} \beta_1 (\sum_{i=1}^N x_i)^2 = \frac{1}{N} (\sum_{i=1}^N y_i)(\sum_{i=1}^N x_i)i=1∑N​β0​xi​+N1​β1​(i=1∑N​xi​)2=N1​(i=1∑N​yi​)(i=1∑N​xi​)

children.value: を2行目から差し引くと

children.html: ∑i=1Nβ1xi2−1Nβ1(∑i=1Nxi)2=∑i=1Nyixi−1N(∑i=1Nyi)(∑i=1Nxi)\begin{align} \sum_{i=1}^N \beta_1 x_i^2 - \frac{1}{N} \beta_1 (\sum_{i=1}^N x_i)^2 &= \sum_{i=1}^N y_i x_i - \frac{1}{N} (\sum_{i=1}^N y_i)(\sum_{i=1}^N x_i) \end{align}i=1∑N​β1​xi2​−N1​β1​(i=1∑N​xi​)2​=i=1∑N​yi​xi​−N1​(i=1∑N​yi​)(i=1∑N​xi​)​​
1N\frac{1}{N}N1​

1N∑i=1Nβ1xi2−β1(1N∑i=1Nxi)2=1N∑i=1Nyixi−(1N∑i=1Nyi)(1N∑i=1Nxi)\begin{align} \frac{1}{N} \sum_{i=1}^N \beta_1 x_i^2 - \beta_1 (\frac{1}{N} \sum_{i=1}^N x_i)^2 &= \frac{1}{N} \sum_{i=1}^N y_i x_i - (\frac{1}{N} \sum_{i=1}^N y_i)(\frac{1}{N} \sum_{i=1}^N x_i) \end{align}N1​i=1∑N​β1​xi2​−β1​(N1​i=1∑N​xi​)2​=N1​i=1∑N​yi​xi​−(N1​i=1∑N​yi​)(N1​i=1∑N​xi​)​​

children.value:
\begin{align}
\beta_1 \left(
\frac{1}{N} \sum_{i=1}^N x_i^2 
- (\frac{1}{N} \sum_{i=1}^N x_i)^2
\right)
&= \frac{1}{N} \sum_{i=1}^N y_i x_i
- (\frac{1}{N} \sum_{i=1}^N y_i)(\frac{1}{N} \sum_{i=1}^N x_i)
\end{align}
children.html: β1(1N∑i=1Nxi2−(1N∑i=1Nxi)2)=1N∑i=1Nyixi−(1N∑i=1Nyi)(1N∑i=1Nxi)\begin{align} \beta_1 \left( \frac{1}{N} \sum_{i=1}^N x_i^2 - (\frac{1}{N} \sum_{i=1}^N x_i)^2 \right) &= \frac{1}{N} \sum_{i=1}^N y_i x_i - (\frac{1}{N} \sum_{i=1}^N y_i)(\frac{1}{N} \sum_{i=1}^N x_i) \end{align}β1​(N1​i=1∑N​xi2​−(N1​i=1∑N​xi​)2)​=N1​i=1∑N​yi​xi​−(N1​i=1∑N​yi​)(N1​i=1∑N​xi​)​​

β1=1N∑i=1Nyixi−(1N∑i=1Nyi)(1N∑i=1Nxi)1N∑i=1Nxi2−(1N∑i=1Nxi)2=1N∑i=1Nyixi−yˉxˉ1N∑i=1Nxi2−xˉ2=Cov[x,y]Var[x]\begin{align} \beta_1 &= \frac { \frac{1}{N} \sum_{i=1}^N y_i x_i - (\frac{1}{N} \sum_{i=1}^N y_i)(\frac{1}{N} \sum_{i=1}^N x_i) } { \frac{1}{N} \sum_{i=1}^N x_i^2 - (\frac{1}{N} \sum_{i=1}^N x_i)^2 } \\ &= \frac { \frac{1}{N} \sum_{i=1}^N y_i x_i - \bar{y}\bar{x} } { \frac{1}{N} \sum_{i=1}^N x_i^2 - \bar{x}^2 } \\ &= \frac { Cov[x, y] } { Var[x] } \end{align}β1​​=N1​∑i=1N​xi2​−(N1​∑i=1N​xi​)2N1​∑i=1N​yi​xi​−(N1​∑i=1N​yi​)(N1​∑i=1N​xi​)​=N1​∑i=1N​xi2​−xˉ2N1​∑i=1N​yi​xi​−yˉ​xˉ​=Var[x]Cov[x,y]​​​

Var[x]=1N∑i=1N(xi−xˉ)2=1N∑i=1N(xi2−2xixˉ+xˉ2)=1N∑i=1Nxi2−2xˉ2+xˉ2=1N∑i=1Nxi2−xˉ2\begin{align} Var[x] &= \frac{1}{N} \sum_{i=1}^N (x_i - \bar{x})^2 \\ &= \frac{1}{N} \sum_{i=1}^N ( x_i^2 - 2 x_i \bar{x} + \bar{x}^2 ) \\ &= \frac{1}{N} \sum_{i=1}^N x_i^2 - 2 \bar{x}^2 + \bar{x}^2 \\ &= \frac{1}{N} \sum_{i=1}^N x_i^2 - \bar{x}^2 \end{align}Var[x]​=N1​i=1∑N​(xi​−xˉ)2=N1​i=1∑N​(xi2​−2xi​xˉ+xˉ2)=N1​i=1∑N​xi2​−2xˉ2+xˉ2=N1​i=1∑N​xi2​−xˉ2​​

Cov[x,y]=1N∑i=1N(xi−xˉ)(yi−yˉ)=1N∑i=1Nxiyi−2xˉyˉ+xˉyˉ=1N∑i=1Nxiyi−xˉyˉ\begin{align} Cov[x, y] &= \frac{1}{N} \sum_{i=1}^N (x_i - \bar{x}) (y_i - \bar{y}) \\ &= \frac{1}{N} \sum_{i=1}^N x_i y_i - 2\bar{x}\bar{y} + \bar{x}\bar{y} \\ &= \frac{1}{N} \sum_{i=1}^N x_i y_i - \bar{x}\bar{y} \end{align}Cov[x,y]​=N1​i=1∑N​(xi​−xˉ)(yi​−yˉ​)=N1​i=1∑N​xi​yi​−2xˉyˉ​+xˉyˉ​=N1​i=1∑N​xi​yi​−xˉyˉ​​​
β0\beta_0β0​

children.value: については、上記の連立方程式の1つ目の式

children.html: Nβ0+∑i=1Nβ1xi=∑i=1NyiN \beta_0 + \sum_{i=1}^N \beta_1 x_i = \sum_{i=1}^N y_iNβ0​+i=1∑N​β1​xi​=i=1∑N​yi​
NNN

β0=1N∑i=1Nyi−1N∑i=1Nβ1xi=yˉ−β1xˉ\begin{align} \beta_0 &= \frac{1}{N} \sum_{i=1}^N y_i - \frac{1}{N} \sum_{i=1}^N \beta_1 x_i \\ &= \bar{y} - \beta_1 \bar{x} \end{align}β0​​=N1​i=1∑N​yi​−N1​i=1∑N​β1​xi​=yˉ​−β1​xˉ​​

children.value: 最尤推定量（単回帰モデル）

children.html: β0=yˉ−β1xˉ,β1=Cov[x,y]Var[x]\beta_0 = \bar{y} - \beta_1 \bar{x} , \hspace{2em} \beta_1 = \frac { Cov[x, y] } { Var[x] }β0​=yˉ​−β1​xˉ,β1​=Var[x]Cov[x,y]​

children.value: 残差二乗和（RSS）の等高線を描いてみると、OLS推定値が極小値となっていることがわかる。（OLS以外のExamplesは適当な値を入れた単なる例。最適解からズレていることがわかる。）

import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import seaborn as sns

# data -------------------------
np.random.seed(0)
n = 10
beta_0 = 5
beta_1 = 10
x = np.sort(np.random.uniform(size=n))
e = np.random.normal(scale=2, size=n)
y = beta_0 + beta_1 * x + e

# calc RSS ---------------------
def rss(y_true, x, beta_0, beta_1):
    y_pred = beta_0 + beta_1 * x
    return sum((y_true - y_pred)**2)

beta_0_range = np.linspace(-5, 20, 26)
beta_1_range = np.linspace(-5, 20, 26)
Beta0, Beta1 = np.meshgrid(beta_0_range, beta_1_range)
Loss = np.array([rss(y, x, b0, b1) for b0, b1 in zip(Beta0.flatten(), Beta1.flatten())]).reshape(Beta0.shape)

# OLS estimate ------------------
beta_1_hat = np.cov(x, y)[0, 1] / np.var(x)
beta_0_hat = y.mean() - beta_1_hat * x.mean()
loss_ = rss(y, x, beta_0_hat, beta_1_hat)
color_ols = "black"

# wrong estimate
beta_wrongs = [(15, -4), (5, 9)]
color_wrong = "red"

# plot ---------------------------
fig, axes = plt.subplots(ncols=2, figsize=[10,3])

# scatter
axes[0].scatter(x, y)
axes[0].set(xlabel="x", ylabel="y", title="example of linear models")

for i, (b0, b1) in enumerate(beta_wrongs, 1):
    y_pred = b0 + b1 * x
    axes[0].plot(x, y_pred, label=f"Example {i}: β0={b0:.1f}, β1={b1:.1f}", color=color_wrong, linestyle=":", alpha=.5)

y_pred = beta_0_hat + beta_1_hat * x
axes[0].plot(x, y_pred, label=f"OLS Estimates: β0={beta_0_hat:.1f}, β1={beta_1_hat:.1f}", color=color_ols)

axes[0].legend(loc="lower right")

# RSS
cs = axes[1].contourf(Beta0, Beta1, Loss, levels=[0, 50, 100, 200], alpha=0.5)
axes[1].set(xlabel="β0", ylabel="β1", title="Residual Sum of Squares")

for i, (b0, b1) in enumerate(beta_wrongs, 1):
    axes[1].scatter(b0, b1, color=color_wrong)
    axes[1].text(b0 * 1.1, b1, f"Example {i}\n(β0={b0:.1f}, β1={b1:.1f})", color=color_wrong, alpha=.5)

axes[1].scatter(beta_0_hat, beta_1_hat, color=color_ols)
axes[1].text(beta_0_hat * 1.1, beta_1_hat, f"Minimum Point (OLS Estimates)\n(β0={beta_0_hat:.1f}, β1={beta_1_hat:.1f})", color=color_ols)

fig.show()

# # 3d plot --------------------
# from matplotlib import cm
# fig, ax = plt.subplots(dpi=120, subplot_kw={"projection": "3d"})
# surf = ax.plot_surface(Beta0, Beta1, Loss, rstride=1, cstride=1, linewidth=1, antialiased=True, cmap=cm.coolwarm)
# fig.colorbar(surf, shrink=0.5, aspect=5, pad=0.11)
# ax.set(xlabel="beta_0", ylabel="beta_1", zlabel="Residual Sum of Squares")

# # # add a point
# # ax.scatter(beta_0_hat, beta_1_hat, loss_, color="darkorange")
# # ax.text(beta_0_hat * 0.99, beta_1_hat, loss_ * 1.1, f"Lowest point (β0={beta_0_hat:.1f}, β1={beta_1_hat:.1f})", color="darkorange")

# fig.show()
